input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.13.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.13.3.1
            TITLE: inspection stickers may be removed from vehicles that are not in compliance with the rules or

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.13.3.1: Inspection Stickers may be removed from vehicles that are not in compliance with the Rules or
IN.13.3.1 Inspection Stickers may be removed from vehicles that are not in compliance with the Rules or 
are required to be Reinspected.

final_answer: Inspection Stickers may be removed from vehicles that are not in compliance with the Rules or are required to be Reinspected.
